def positive_synchronous_log_handler_or_flush_called_on_fast_path():
    rule_id = "synchronous_log_handler_or_flush_called_on_fast_path"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code that forces synchronous log flushing in latency-sensitive paths."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
